docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2009 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASGHA CUMMINGS FILED BY SAUNDERS, KELSEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUNDERS, KELSEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITIAPARTMENTS,INC. $2,104.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,154.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,104.00 FILED BY SAUNDERS, KELSEY AS TO DEFENDANT CITIAPARTMENTS,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIAPARTMENTS,INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITIAPARTMENTS,INC.
